corrections.note: Left-margin/page line indicator (31) was captured as inline verse text; in print it appears in the margin before Εὐλογημένη.
Printed apparatus has circumflex on ου.
The apparatus reads ἐπιγνοῖ; transcript has wrong final vowel and missing accent.
Printed apparatus reads ἐξελύθη ℵ* (ἐξελύθη ℵc.a); transcript misread final eta as sigma and omitted accents.

notes: Running head matches. Body is accurate apart from one marginal line-number intrusion. Apparatus mostly matches; no additional certain discrepancies noted.
